name: DuSolo Fertilizers Inc.
description: DuSolo Fertilizers Inc. is a Canada-based company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resource properties in Brazil. The company focuses on developing agricultural projects, specifically phosphate projects, to supply the Brazilian agriculture industry. Its primary asset is the Bomfim Phosphate Project located in the Tocantins State, Brazil, which aims to produce direct application natural phosphate fertilizer.
